name: conservation-outliers
title: Conservation Insight — County-Level Outlier Detection
subtitle: which counties and districts diverge furthest from the regional common estimate
description: A conservation-insight showcase focused on finding outliers — a county-level choropleth of the common estimate, a district-level ranking of adoption deviation from the regional baseline, a histogram showing how deviation is distributed across every county, and the overall share of counties flagged as outliers.

dataAccesses.name: OutlierKPI
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(AVG(pct),1) AS adoption_pct, COUNT(DISTINCT geoid) AS county_count, COUNT(DISTINCT crd) AS district_count, ROUND(MAX(ABS(adoption_diff_pct)),1) AS biggest_outlier_pct FROM v_county_outliers

dataAccesses.name: CountyAdoptionByFIPS
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT fips AS geoid, provider, ROUND(AVG(pct),0) AS pct FROM v_county_adoption GROUP BY 1,2

dataAccesses.name: DistrictDeviation
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT crd, ROUND(AVG(pct) - (SELECT AVG(pct) FROM v_county_adoption),1) AS adoption_diff_pct FROM v_district_adoption WHERE practice LIKE ${practice} GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 2 DESC

dataAccesses.name: PracticeOptions
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT DISTINCT practice FROM v_district_adoption ORDER BY 1

dataAccesses.name: CountyDeviationDistribution
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT fips AS geoid, ROUND(pct - (SELECT AVG(pct) FROM v_county_adoption),1) AS adoption_diff_pct FROM v_county_outliers

dataAccesses.name: OutlierSharePct
dataAccesses.sql: SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ABS(adoption_diff_pct) >= 10) / COUNT(*),1) AS outlier_share_pct FROM v_county_outliers

kpis.label: Regional Adoption Rate
kpis.info: Common-estimate adoption rate across every county, the baseline outliers are measured against.

kpis.label: Counties Compared
kpis.info: Distinct Corn Belt counties represented in the sample.

kpis.label: Crop Reporting Districts
kpis.info: Distinct NASS crop-reporting districts the county-level rows roll up into.

kpis.label: Largest County Deviation
kpis.info: The single largest gap between a county's estimate and the regional common estimate.

panels.title: Cover-crop Adoption by County (FIPS)
panels.info: Median adoption rate across the selected providers, at the county scale — the base map outliers are spotted against.

panels.title: Adoption Deviation by District
panels.sub: responds to the Practice filter above
panels.info: Each crop-reporting district's adoption estimate minus the regional common estimate — furthest bars are the sharpest outliers.

panels.title: Distribution of County Deviations
panels.info: How every county's deviation from the regional common estimate is spread — a tight spike near zero with a thin tail of true outliers.

panels.title: Counties Flagged as Outliers
panels.info: Share of counties whose adoption estimate deviates 10 percentage points or more from the regional common estimate.
